revision.text: ! {{if year|{{{year}}}|2=style="background-color: gold;"}} | {{{1}}} | {{if year|{{{year}}}|2=style="background-color: gold;"}} | [[{{{1}}}]]-[[{{MONTHNAME|{{{2}}}}} {{{3}}}|{{MONTHABBREV|{{{2}}}}}-{{{3}}}]] {{{4}}}

<includeonly>! {{Solar term/if year|1={{{1|}}}|2=style="background-color: gold;"}} | {{{1|}}}
| {{Solar term/if year|1={{{1|}}}|2=style="background-color: gold;"}} | [[{{{2|}}}]]-[[{{MONTHNAME|{{{3|}}}}} {{{4|}}}|{{MONTHABBREV|{{{3|}}}}}-{{{4|}}}]] {{{5|}}}
| {{Solar term/if year|1={{{1|}}}|2=style="background-color: gold;"}} | [[{{{6|}}}]]-[[{{MONTHNAME|{{{7|}}}}} {{{8|}}}|{{MONTHABBREV|{{{7|}}}}}-{{{8|}}}]] {{{9|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>

[[Category:Solar term templates| ]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Don't use monthabbrv in YMD dates
revision.text:
<includeonly>! {{Solar term/if year|1={{{1|}}}|2=style="background-color: gold;"}} | {{{1|}}} | {{Solar term/if year|1={{{1|}}}|2=style="background-color: gold;"}} | {{{2|}}}-{{{3|}}}-{{{4|}}} {{{5|}}} | {{Solar term/if year|1={{{1|}}}|2=style="background-color: gold;"}} | {{{6|}}}-{{{7|}}}-{{{8|}}} {{{9|}}}</includeonly><noinclude>

revision.comment: [[User:addbot|Bot]]: Migrating interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q14388112]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 18 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Solar_term]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606305292|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
